title: Dashboard enhancements and bug fixes
body:
* **Publish with service principal credentials**: Authors can now publish dashboards using the data credentials of a service principal. See [Publish a dashboard](/aws/en/dashboards/share/share#publish-dashboard).
* **Service principal draft view fix**: Fixed a bug where a dashboard published via a service principal loses the ability to view draft.
* **Text widget menu fix**: Removed **Show visualization query** from the kebab menu on text widgets.
* **Service principal ownership**: Workspace admins can now transfer dashboard ownership to a service principal in the UI. See [Transfer ownership of a dashboard](/aws/en/ai-bi/admin#transfer-ownership).
* **Choropleth map admin levels**: Choropleth maps now support US admin levels 3 (regions, multi-state groupings) and 4 (states). See [Map visualizations](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/maps).
* **Publish notification fix**: Fixed a bug where a publish success notification appeared even if the underlying publish failed.
* **SQL editor line numbers**: The SQL query editor now displays line numbers to help with legibility and debugging.
* **PDF subscription page selection**: Dashboard authors can now select which pages to include in PDF email subscriptions. See [Manage scheduled dashboard updates and subscriptions](/aws/en/dashboards/share/schedule-subscribe).
* **Parameter values in widget titles and descriptions**: Dashboard authors can now reference parameter values in widget titles and descriptions, so the text updates dynamically as viewers change parameter selections. See [Work with dashboard parameters](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/filters/parameters).

ref_links.text: Manage scheduled dashboard updates and subscriptions
